title: deinbollia kilimandscharica var. kilimandscharica
intro: Deinbollia kilimandscharica var. kilimandscharica, also known as mountain apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to the mountainous regions of East Africa, particularly in Tanzania and Kenya. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Deinbollia kilimandscharica var. kilimandscharica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for herbal use.
